case_title: ABIRI, DAN et al VS HOWARD, ALDEN C/O CATHERINE COATNEY DESIGNS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ABIRI, DAN ABIRI, YAEL AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, ALDEN C/O CATHERINE COATNEY  DESIGNS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABIRI, DAN ABIRI, YAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD, ALDEN C/O CATHERINE COATNEY  DESIGNS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE IS RESET TO APRIL 14, 1997 SO AN OEX COULD BE ISSUED ON THIS DATE WHICH IS 30 DAYS AFTER JUDGMENT DATE.
THIS CLAIM WAS ACTUALLY FILED IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY, CASE NO. 96M11530 ON 2/11/97.
TRIAL RESET TO APR-14-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF APR-04-1997 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, ALDEN C/O CATHERINE COATNEY  DESIGNS HEARING SET FOR JUN-16-1997 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-30-1997 AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, ALDEN C/O CATHERINE COATNEY  DESIGNS
CIVIL SUBPENA SERVED TO ALDEN HOWARD.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUN-16-1997, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD, ALDEN C/O CATHERINE COATNEY  DESIGNS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HOWARD, ALDEN C/O CATHERINE COATNEY  DESIGNS HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENT SCHEDULED FOR 7/17/97 IS VACATED PER COURT ORDER DATED 6/20/97.SF SMALL CLAIMS COURT DOES NOT HAVE JURISDICTION TO HEAR
THE MOTION. THE PROPER VENUE IS LOS ANGELES MUNICIPAL COURT #2 WHERE THE CASE WAS ORIGINALLY FILED AND JUDGMENT RENDERED.
COPIES OF ORDER SENT TO PARTIES.
CORRESPONDENCE RE SHORTENING TIME FROM PLTF FILED.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-17-1997, OFF CALENDAR
